yesmand-once.template: Run one yesmand polling cycle: `bun run ~/dotfiles/yesmand/src/index.ts --once --config ~/dotfiles/yesmand/config.json`. Report discovered candidates and dispatched sessions.

yesmand-dry.template: Run one dry-run yesmand polling cycle: `bun run ~/dotfiles/yesmand/src/index.ts --once --dry-run --config ~/dotfiles/yesmand/config.json`. Report what would be dispatched.
